title: Junior Flutter Developer
description:
We are seeking a Junior Flutter Developer to join our team of mobile app developers. As a Junior Flutter Developer, you will be responsible for developing high-quality mobile applications using Flutter and Dart.

Responsibilities:
- Develop mobile applications using Flutter and Dart
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams to design and implement new features
- Troubleshoot and debug issues in mobile applications
- Participate in code reviews and contribute to the improvement of the codebase
- Stay up-to-date with the latest trends and technologies in mobile app development

Must-have skills:
- Flutter
- Dart
- GetX
- Provider
- Git
- Firebase
- BLoC
- Agile

Nice to have:
- Experience with CI/CD pipelines
- Knowledge of testing frameworks such as Jest or Mockito
- Familiarity with REST API and API design principles
